meta.title: This is why you NEED technical debt
meta.description:
Malte Ubl, CTO of Vercel shares the importance of technical debt. 

These are the kind of insights that are shared at AI Dev.

Join us at AI Dev 26 × San Francisco, April 28–29.
🎟️ https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
